title: Seven regenerated description.json records still carry stale parentChain ancestry
evidence: The sampled record's specFolder points at the current 006/005 path, but parentChain still lists 021-deep-skill-evolution and 004-deep-research. Exhaustive audit found 7 parentChain mismatches across 235 description.json files.
claim: All affected identity metadata was corrected after the TOP_MAP bug fix.
counterevidenceSought: Exhaustive checks found 0 packet_id/spec_folder/specFolder mismatches and 0 dangling children_ids, so the issue is isolated to description.json.parentChain.
alternativeExplanation: specId appears to be a short local sequence ID and was not used as blocking evidence; parentChain encodes old path ancestry and contradicts current folder hierarchy.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade or close if schema owner confirms parentChain is intentionally historical rather than current path ancestry.
recommendation: Regenerate or patch parentChain for the 7 affected description.json records and add parentChain equality to future metadata verification.

notes: Structural graph checks passed; parentChain metadata check failed for 7 description.json records.
